column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `justifications` extension <-> NIST OSCAL (Open Security Controls Assessment Language) responsibility / risk-acceptance / by-component statement concepts. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) - most DPV justifications are domain-specific (GDPR objection grounds, public-interest exceptions, breach-notice waivers) without a direct OSCAL counterpart, so almost all rows are `skos:relatedMatch` against generic OSCAL responsibility / risk-acceptance constructs. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
